question: List the record company shared by the most number of orchestras.
gold_sql: SELECT Record_Company FROM orchestra GROUP BY Record_Company ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
predicted_sql: SELECT attr_de17f0_organization FROM orchestra GROUP BY attr_de17f0_organization ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
